name: Frosted Food Fight
description: Frosted Food Fight is a party counterpart of Food Fight who appears exclusively in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was a special promotional character released to celebrate the launch of Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Frosted Food Fight is a party counterpart of Food Fight who appears exclusively in Skylanders: Lost Islands. Players could get him for free by downloading an update for Lost Islands, but he was only available until the end of October 2014. He serves as a festive 'Alter Ego' variant of the original Food Fight character.
quote: Frosted Food Fight just brought sugary treats to the Lost Islands!
personality: A celebratory and festive version of Food Fight who enjoys sugary treats and holiday events.

content: Frosted Food Fight just brought sugary treats to the Lost Islands! Help us celebrate the release of Trap Team with him!

trivia: He is the third Lost Islands Alter Ego Skylander who can't be earned from the Wishing Well (the first is Admiral Thumpback and the second is Holiday Wash Buckler).
He was released specifically to celebrate the launch of Skylanders: Trap Team.
gameplay: In Skylanders: Lost Islands, Frosted Food Fight functions as an Alter Ego. He is used by players to manage their kingdom, clear obstacles, and generate gold and energy over time. Unlike console versions, his gameplay is focused on resource management rather than direct combat.
